name: modern-ecommerce-platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with Next.js, Payload CMS, and Medusa.js

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:cms" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:sync"
scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:cms && npm run install:backend && npm run install:sync
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:cms && npm run build:backend

author: Your Name
